hero_title: Honoring Lives amidst Maui's Natural Beauty
hero_desc: We handle every detail of your loved one's Celebration of Life, offering full-service support, gentle ceremonies, and peace of mind when you need it most.
about_title: Compassionate Support Every Step of the Way
about_text: At Scatter Ashes Maui, we handle all the details of your loved one's Celebration of Life so you don't have to. Kokua is a Hawaiian word meaning "help", "aid" or "assistance". It embodies the spirit of lending a hand or offering support to others in need of it. Discover peace of mind with our personalized, full service care embodying the spirit of Kokua - offering support every step of the way with warmth, understanding, and respect.
services_subtitle: Discover the packages and customized options from our service brochure. Scatter Ashes Maui is here to offer kokua, making your experience easier with a touch of aloha.
service_raft_desc: Set sail off Maui's coast with a larger vessel. Provides spacious seating and comfortable access for family members to say their goodbyes.
service_snorkel_desc: A beautiful vessel option combining a respectful ceremony with a reflective snorkel in Maui's tropical marine environment.
service_helicopter_desc: A premium air-based tribute providing sweeping coastal and mountain views as cremains are committed to the wind.
service_plane_desc: Scattering cremains by plane carries them across the island's breathtaking vistas. A serene, quiet, and expansive aerial memorial.
service_unattended_desc: For those unable to attend, we offer compassionate services, coordinating with estate representatives or handling the ceremony on your behalf.
service_special_desc: Creating multiple member services, pet ceremonies, and ceremonies on land.
service_kahu_desc: Hawaiian style, non-denominational spiritual advisor or minister providing blessings and traditional Hawaiian context.
service_puolo_desc: A sacred, traditional ti leaf eco-urn handcrafted in Hawai'i using natural greenery and local anthurium flowers.
service_urns_desc: Ocean-safe, eco-friendly urns made of biodegradable materials designed to release cremains gently into the sea.
service_petals_desc: Bags of loose fresh flower petals to scatter on the water as a beautiful and colorful tribute.
service_leis_desc: Ocean-safe traditional leis crafted with fresh ti leaves or orchids to float alongside the ashes.
service_vocalist_desc: Serene melodies and aloha vibes by an award-winning local singer playing the ukulele.
service_song_desc: A professional songwriter creates and performs a personalized song dedicated entirely to your loved one.
service_doves_desc: A symbolic and peaceful release of white doves over the waters of Maui during the ceremony.
service_beach_desc: A customized land or beach ceremony for those who prefer to gather onshore amidst Maui's scenery.
service_photo_desc: A professional photographer captures high-resolution memories, vital for both attended and unattended services.
service_wreath_desc: A beautiful, circular floral wreath made of fresh, ocean-safe flowers designed to float gracefully on the waves.
service_bamboo_desc: An elegant, organic floral arrangement styled on a floating bamboo base for a serene ocean farewell.
service_easel_desc: Easel-mounted floral arrangements for display on the vessel deck or beach shore during the tribute.
services_disclaimer: Prices do not include tax and fees, and are subject to change without notice. Inquire about multiple member services, pet ceremonies, and land ceremonies.
planner_subtitle: Customize a ceremony that reflects your preferences. Toggle choices below to estimate pricing and quickly submit a detailed request to our team.
history_quote: "Over the span of decades, I've lovingly crafted ceremonies as sacred celebrations of life, feeling the presence of each cherished soul..."
history_text1: In the gentle tradewinds of Maui, amidst the whispers of the sea and the songs of the land, Scatter Ashes Maui was born. Inspired by the aloha spirit and sacred traditions of these islands, we envisioned a sanctuary of peace and comfort for those seeking to honor their beloved departed.
history_text2: With every ceremony, we embrace the essence of kokua, offering compassionate care, meticulous attention to detail, and a Full-Service approach to ensure every aspect of the journey is handled with utmost professionalism.
contact_desc: Reach out to us today. We are here to answer all questions, check availability, and help you customize the perfect celebration.
form_msg_placeholder: Describe the style of ceremony, dates, and package add-ons you are interested in...
modal_text: Your ceremony request has been submitted successfully. A representative will contact you shortly with dates and details.
